PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\文件\\後醫系\\二階國考\\考古題\\git\\medlic_exam_stage2_simulator\\exam\\111-1-4.json" -Encoding UTF8 -Raw; $lines = $content -split "`n"; $lineNum = 0; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $lineNum++; if \($line -match '"question"|"[A-D]":'\) { if \($line -match '[一-鿿] [一-鿿]'\) { Write-Output "${lineNum}: $line" } } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\文件\\後醫系\\二階國考\\考古題\\git\\medlic_exam_stage2_simulator\\exam\\111-1-5.json" -Encoding UTF8 -Raw; $lines = $content -split "`n"; $lineNum = 0; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $lineNum++; if \($line -match '"question"|"[A-D]":'\) { if \($line -match '[一-鿿] [一-鿿]'\) { Write-Output "${lineNum}: $\($line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $line.Length\)\)\)" } } })
